observations.note: Run 178: ACTIVE INTERVENTION — memory crisis. Available RAM was 539Mi (down from 2.7Gi). Root cause: 10 orphaned chrome-devtools-mcp processes (ppid=1) from old pipeline cycles, each keeping a Chrome browser alive. Total Chrome RSS ~10GB. Killed all 10 orphans — memory recovered to 5.3Gi. Fixed cron-orchestrator.sh: added cleanup block at cycle start to kill orphaned MCPs and remove stale Puppeteer profiles. Also cleaned up 11 stale /tmp/puppeteer_dev_chrome_profile-* dirs. System: disk 14%/63G free, mem 5.3Gi available (post-fix), load 4.06 (pipeline active). Cron/Nginx active. HTTP 200. fail2ban: 4 banned, 10231 total (+96). Git objects: 1459 loose (25KB). 108 JS files deployed (+2). tasks.md 165KB/302 lines. Task counts: 28 DONE, 1 IN_PROGRESS, 1 VERIFIED. Counter at 110. No active SYSTEM CRITICAL.
